text: MEMO is a method allowing Retention Time (RT) agnostic alignment of metabolomics samples using the fragmentation spectra (MS2) of their constituents.
source_excerpt:
is a method allowing a Retention Time (RT) agnostic alignment of
metabolomics samples using the fragmentation spectra (MS2) of their
consituents

super_pattern.subject: MEMO
super_pattern.object: metabolomics samples via MS2 fragmentation spectra

text: MS2 fingerprints are generated by counting the occurrence of MS2 peaks and neutral losses in each sample.
source_excerpt:
The occurence of MS2 peaks and neutral losses (to the precursor) in each sample is counted
and used to generate an *MS2 fingerprint* of the sample.

super_pattern.subject: MS2 fingerprints
super_pattern.relation: generated from counting MS2 peaks and neutral losses

text: MEMO is mainly built on matchms and spec2vec packages for handling MS2 spectra.
source_excerpt:
MEMO is mainly built on `matchms`_ and `spec2vec`_ packages for handling
the MS2 spectra and converting them into documents.

super_pattern.subject: MEMO
super_pattern.relation: is built on matchms and spec2vec packages
super_pattern.object: MS2 spectra handling and document conversion
